chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ نَامَ عَنْ وِتْرٍ، أَوْ نَسِيَهُ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Witr with three, five, seven, or nine Rak’ah
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْوِتْرِ بِثَلاَثٍ وَخَمْسٍ وَسَبْعٍ وَتِسْعٍ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Witr when traveling
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْوِتْرِ فِي السَّفَرِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the two Rak’ah sitting down after Witr
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ بَعْدَ الْوِتْرِ جَالِسًا

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning lying down after Witr and after the two Rak’ah of Fajr
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الضَّجْعَةِ بَعْدَ الْوِتْرِ وَبَعْدَ رَكْعَتَىِ الْفَجْرِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Witr while riding
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْوِتْرِ عَلَى الرَّاحِلَةِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Witr at the beginning of the night
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْوِتْرِ أَوَّلَ اللَّيْلِ

chapters.title: Forgetfulness during Prayer
Whoever performed the Zuhr with five Rak’ah because he forgot
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَنْ صَلَّى الظُّهْرَ خَمْسًا وَهُوَ سَاهٍ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning one who stands up after two Rak’ah by mistake
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ قَامَ مِنَ اثْنَتَيْنِ سَاهِيًا

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning one who is uncertain about his Prayer; let him refer to what is more certain
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ شَكَّ فِي صَلاَتِهِ فَرَجَعَ إِلَى الْيَقِينِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning one who is uncertain about his Prayer, so he should try to do what is correct
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ شَكَّ فِي صَلاَتِهِ فَتَحَرَّى الصَّوَابَ

chapters.title: One who says the Salam after two or three Rak’ah by mistake
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِيمَنْ سَلَّمَ مِنْ ثِنْتَيْنِ أَوْ ثَلاَثٍ سَاهِيًا

chapters.title: Concerning the two prostration of forgetfulness before the Salam
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي سَجْدَتَىِ السَّهْوِ قَبْلَ السَّلاَمِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning one who does the prostration after the Salam
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ سَجَدَهُمَا بَعْدَ السَّلاَمِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning resuming the Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْبِنَاءِ عَلَى الصَّلاَةِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning how to leave the prayer if one commits Hadath
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ أَحْدَثَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ كَيْفَ يَنْصَرِفُ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the Prayer of a sick person
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الْمَرِيضِ

chapters.title: Voluntary prayer while sitting
The prayer of the one who sits is equivalent to half of the Prayer of one who stands
chapters.title_arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الْقَاعِدِ عَلَى النِّصْفِ مِنْ صَلاَةِ الْقَائِمِ

chapters.title: What has been narrated concerning the Prayer of the Messenger of Allah (saws) during his sickness
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ـ صلى الله عليه وسلم ـ فِي مَرَضِهِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the Prayer of the Messenger of Allah (saws) performing Prayer behind a man from his Ummah
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ـ صلى الله عليه وسلم ـ خَلْفَ رَجُلٍ مِنْ أُمَّتِهِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the fact that the Imam is appointed to be followed
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي إِنَّمَا جُعِلَ الإِمَامُ لِيُؤْتَمَّ بِهِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Qunut in the Fajr Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقُنُوتِ فِي صَلاَةِ الْفَجْرِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning killing snakes and scorpions during the Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي قَتْلِ الْحَيَّةِ وَالْعَقْرَبِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ

chapters.title: The prohibition of Prayer after the Fajr and the ‘Asr
chapters.title_arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنِ الصَّلاَةِ، بَعْدَ الْفَجْرِ وَبَعْدَ الْعَصْرِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the times when it is disliked to perform Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي السَّاعَاتِ الَّتِي تُكْرَهُ فِيهَا الصَّلاَةُ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the concession allowing Prayer in Makkah at any time
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الرُّخْصَةِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ بِمَكَّةَ فِي كُلِّ وَقْتٍ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning delaying the Prayer beyond its time
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا إِذَا أَخَّرُوا الصَّلاَةَ عَنْ وَقْتِهَا

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the fear Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الْخَوْفِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the eclipse Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الْكُسُوفِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the Prayer for rain
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning supplication for rain
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الدُّعَاءِ فِي الاِسْتِسْقَاءِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the ‘Eid Prayers
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الْعِيدَيْنِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning how many times the Imam should say the Takbir in the Eid Prayers
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَمْ يُكَبِّرُ الإِمَامُ فِي صَلاَةِ الْعِيدَيْنِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the recitation in the ‘Eid Prayers
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي صَلاَةِ الْعِيدَيْنِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the sermon for ‘Eid
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْخُطْبَةِ فِي الْعِيدَيْنِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning waiting for the sermon after the Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي انْتِظَارِ الْخُطْبَةِ بَعْدَ الصَّلاَةِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Praying before or after the ‘Eid Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ قَبْلَ صَلاَةِ الْعِيدِ وَبَعْدَهَا

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning going out to the ‘Eid Prayer walking
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْخُرُوجِ إِلَى الْعِيدِ مَاشِيًا

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning going out on the day of ‘Eid via one route and returning via another route
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْخُرُوجِ يَوْمَ الْعِيدِ مِنْ طَرِيقٍ وَالرُّجُوعِ مِنْ غَيْرِهِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Taqlis on the day of ‘Eid
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي التَّقْلِيسِ يَوْمَ الْعِيدِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning carrying a spear on the day of ‘Eid
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْحَرْبَةِ يَوْمَ الْعِيدِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning women going out on the two ‘Eid
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي خُرُوجِ النِّسَاءِ فِي الْعِيدَيْنِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning two ‘Eid occurring on the same day
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا إِذَا اجْتَمَعَ الْعِيدَانِ فِي يَوْمٍ

chapters.title: What was narrated about the `Eid prayer being in the masjid when it is raining
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الْعِيدِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ إِذَا كَانَ مَطَرٌ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning wearing weapons on the day of ‘Eid
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي لُبْسِ السِّلاَحِ فِي يَوْمِ الْعِيدِ

chapters.title: What was narrated about taking a bath on the two ‘Eid
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الاِغْتِسَالِ فِي الْعِيدَيْنِ

chapters.title: The time of the ‘Eid Prayer
What was narrated concerning the (voluntary) night Prayer is two by two
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ اللَّيْلِ رَكْعَتَيْنِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning (voluntary) Prayers at night and during the day are two by two
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ مَثْنَى مَثْنَى

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Qiyam (the voluntary night Prayers) during the month of Ramadan
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي قِيامِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning voluntary Prayers during the night
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي قِيَامِ اللَّيْلِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning one who wakes up his family at night
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ أَيْقَظَ أَهْلَهُ مِنَ اللَّيْلِ

chapters.title: Making one’s voice beautiful when reciting Qur’an
What was narrated concerning one who sleeps and misses his daily portion of the Qur’an
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ نَامَ عَنْ جُزْئِهِ، مِنَ اللَّيْلِ

chapters.title: How much (time) is recommended regarding the completion of the Qur’an
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَمْ يُسْتَحَبُّ يُخْتَمُ الْقُرْآنُ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning recitation in the (voluntary) night Prayers
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقِرَاءَةِ فِي صَلاَةِ اللَّيْلِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning supplication when a man stands to pray at night
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الدُّعَاءِ إِذَا قَامَ الرَّجُلُ مِنَ اللَّيْلِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning how many Rak’ah should be prayed at night
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَمْ يُصَلِّي بِاللَّيْلِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning which hours of the night are best
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي أَىِّ سَاعَاتِ اللَّيْلِ أَفْضَلُ

chapters.title: What was narrated about what it is hoped will suffice for the night Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا يُرْجَى أَنْ يَكْفِيَ مِنْ قِيَامِ اللَّيْلِ

chapters.title: What was narrated about if the person praying becomes sleepy
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْمُصَلِّي إِذَا نَعَسَ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning praying between the Maghrib and ‘Isha’
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ بَيْنَ الْمَغْرِبِ وَالْعِشَاءِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning voluntary Prayers offered at home
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي التَّطَوُّعِ فِي الْبَيْتِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Duha Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الضُّحَى

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Isthikhara Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الاِسْتِخَارَةِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Prayer at times of need
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ الْحَاجَةِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the Prayer of glorification
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ التَّسْبِيحِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the night of the middle of Sha’ban
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي لَيْلَةِ النِّصْفِ مِنْ شَعْبَانَ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Prayer and prostration at times of gratitude
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ وَالسَّجْدَةِ عِنْدَ الشُّكْرِ

chapters.title: What was narrated saying that Prayer is an expiation
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي أَنَّ الصَّلاَةَ كَفَّارَةٌ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the five obligatory Prayers and performing them regularly
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي فَرْضِ الصَّلَوَاتِ الْخَمْسِ وَالْمُحَافَظَةِ عَلَيْهَا

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the virtue of praying in the Sacred Mosque and the Mosque of the Prophet (saws)
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي فَضْلِ الصَّلاَةِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ وَمَسْجِدِ النَّبِيِّ ـ صلى الله عليه وسلم ـ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning praying in the Mosque of Baitil-Maqdis (Jerusalem)
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ فِي مَسْجِدِ بَيْتِ الْمَقْدِسِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Prayer in Quba’ Mosque
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ فِي مَسْجِدِ قُبَاءٍ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning Prayer in the Jami’ Masjid
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّلاَةِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْجَامِعِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the beginning of the construction of the pulpit
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي بَدْءِ شَأْنِ الْمِنْبَرِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning standing for a long time in Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي طُولِ الْقِيَامِ فِي الصَّلاَةِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning prostrating a great deal
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَثْرَةِ السُّجُودِ

chapters.title: The first thing for which a person will be called to account will be his Prayers
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي أَوَّلِ مَا يُحَاسَبُ بِهِ الْعَبْدُ الصَّلاَةُ

chapters.title: Offering a voluntary Prayer in the same place as one has offered an obligatory Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَلاَةِ النَّافِلَةِ حَيْثُ تُصَلَّى الْمَكْتُوبَةُ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning having a place in the mosque in which one usually prays
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي تَوْطِينِ الْمَكَانِ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ يُصَلِّي فِيهِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning where shoes should be placed if they are taken off during Prayer
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي أَيْنَ تُوضَعُ النَّعْلُ إِذَا خُلِعَتْ فِي الصَّلاَةِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning visiting the sick
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي عِيَادَةِ الْمَرِيضِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the reward of one who visits a sick person
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي ثَوَابِ مَنْ عَادَ مَرِيضًا

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning urging the dying person to say La ilaha illallah
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي تَلْقِينِ الْمَيِّتِ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning what is to be said to the sick person when death approaches
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ الْمَرِيضِ إِذَا حُضِرَ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the believer being rewarded for the agony of death
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْمُؤْمِنِ يُؤْجَرُ فِي النَّزْعِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning closing the eyes of the deceased
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي تَغْمِيضِ الْمَيِّتِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning kissing the deceased
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي تَقْبِيلِ الْمَيِّتِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning washing the deceased
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي غُسْلِ الْمَيِّتِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning a man washing his wife and a woman washing her husband
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي غُسْلِ الرَّجُلِ امْرَأَتَهُ وَغُسْلِ الْمَرْأَةِ زَوْجَهَا

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the washing of the Prophet (SAW)
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي غُسْلِ النَّبِيِّ ـ صلى الله عليه وسلم ـ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning the shrouding of the Prophet (saws)
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَفَنِ النَّبِيِّ ـ صلى الله عليه وسلم ـ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning what is recommended in shrouding
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنَ الْكَفَنِ

chapters.title: What was narrated concerning looking at the deceased when he has been wrapped in his shroud
